ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly readable. ORIGINAL (1/1). Issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, ICC accredited.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly readable. Issued by Forest Papper AB. Contains full product specification and order/shipment details.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No LC-related terms (Letter of Credit, L/C, Documentary Credit, LC No., LC Number) found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-23D-789840 does not contain 'LC' as a substring. No LC exception applies.

locations_found.location: Header/branding area - 'FOREST PAPPER AB' displayed as company branding/logo text at top of invoice

consignor_search_all_files.notes: The invoice header shows 'FOREST PAP9ER AB' (possible OCR rendering artifact for 'FOREST PAPPER AB'). The address Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG matches the certificate's consignor address. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden.

pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references Invoice No: 108759 which matches the invoice's 'Invoice no 108759'. (2) Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' is identifiable in the invoice header/branding. (3) Consignee 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' is identifiable in both the Delivery address and Buyer fields of the invoice.

candidates.raw_text: PANCAR ORGANIZE SANAYI BOLGESI MUZAFFER SEKBAN CAD NO:8 TORBALI IZMIR
candidates.normalized_text: pancar organize sanayi bolgesi muzaffer sekban cad no:8 torbali izmir

candidates.raw_text: Pancar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi Muzaffer Sekban cad. No:8 Torbali IZMIR TURKEY
candidates.normalized_text: pancar organize sanayi bölgesi muzaffer sekban cad. no:8 torbali izmir turkey

consignor.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: FOREST PAP9ER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG, VAT no: SE556878121401

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Forest Papper AB' in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - The invoice header/branding displays 'FOREST PAP9ER AB' which appears to be an OCR rendering artifact for 'FOREST PAPPER AB'. The address Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG matches exactly. The company is the invoice issuer.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that 'Forest Papper AB' (certificate) matches 'FOREST PAP9ER AB' (invoice header/branding)
comparison_steps.result: The invoice header displays 'FOREST PAP9ER AB'. After normalization of case, this reads 'forest pap9er ab' vs 'forest papper ab'. There is a single character difference: '9' vs 'p'. However, the invoice also shows the same address (Åsgatan 4, Göteborg) and VAT number SE556878121401 (SE prefix confirms Sweden). This appears to be an OCR/font rendering artifact where the letter 'p' was rendered as '9'. Applying rule 4.1.3.8 (single character deviation with confirming identifier).

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.8 - Single character deviation with confirming identifier
comparison_steps.description: Check if the difference is exactly one character and a confirming identifier exists
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. The difference between 'PAPPER' and 'PAP9ER' is exactly one character ('P' vs '9' at position 4). The invoice contains VAT no SE556878121401. While the certificate does not contain an explicit VAT number to compare, the invoice's address (Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG) exactly matches the certificate's address. Additionally, this is the invoice ISSUER — the company that issued both documents. The single-character difference is clearly an OCR/font rendering artifact. Rule 4.1.0 corporate structure applies: the consignor name is identifiable in the invoice header as the issuing company.

MATCH. Certificate states SWEDEN. Invoice address shows GÖTEBORG (a Swedish city). VAT no prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. IBAN prefix 'SE' also confirms Sweden. Country verified via indirect identifiers per 4.1.2.1.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice header/branding as the invoice issuer
Country verification via indirect identifiers - VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE confirm Sweden
Single character deviation (PAP9ER vs PAPPER) - OCR rendering artifact, same address confirms identity

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer in header/branding: 'FOREST PAP9ER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG'. The '9' in 'PAP9ER' is clearly an OCR/font rendering artifact for the second 'P' in 'PAPPER'. The address matches exactly (Åsgatan 4, Göteborg). The company is the invoice issuer. Country confirmed via VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE. MATCH under rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.8.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The '9' in 'PAP9ER' represents a genuinely different company name
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The address is identical (Åsgatan 4, Göteborg), and the company is clearly the invoice issuer. The '9' is a rendering artifact in the OCR/PDF text extraction of the stylized logo font. This is supported by the exact address match.

consignee.certificate_value: VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S., PANCAR ORGANIZE SANAYI BOLGESI MUZAFFER SEKBAN CAD NO:8 TORBALI IZMIR, TURKEY
consignee.invoice_value: VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S., Pancar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi Muzaffer Sekban cad. No:8 Torbali IZMIR, TURKEY

comparison_steps.description: Identify the authoritative consignee field in the invoice. The invoice has a 'Buyer' field with 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.'
comparison_steps.result: The Buyer field is a primary invoicing field per 4.2.0.2 priority 1. Certificate consignee matches the Buyer field exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' with invoice Buyer 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.'
comparison_steps.result: EXACT MATCH after case normalization. Both are 'viva kagit ve ambalaj a.s.'

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee country TURKEY (certificate) with TURKEY (invoice Buyer address)

rules_applied.description: Priority order - Buyer field used as primary invoicing field
Name verification - exact match after normalization

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' in TURKEY. Invoice Buyer field: 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' in TURKEY. Exact match on company name and country. Also confirmed in Delivery address field. Clear MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Fluting- Testliner (Description of Goods); line items: 85 RF1, 85 RF1, 100 T3

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers. Product codes RF1 and T3 appear only in the invoice line items. Priority 1 not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate: 'Fluting- Testliner'. Search for this in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice's 'Description of Goods' field states 'Fluting- Testliner' — an EXACT match of the certificate's identity-bearing main designation.

comparison_steps.description: The invoice line items use codes 'RF1' and 'T3' instead of 'Fluting' and 'Testliner'. These require industry knowledge to map.
comparison_steps.result: The general Description of Goods 'Fluting- Testliner' matches exactly. The line item codes RF1 and T3 are detail-level product specifications. Per 4.3.4, additional detail in the invoice does not affect matching when the identity-bearing main designation is confirmed. However, the certificate says 'Fluting- Testliner' as a combined description, while the invoice has specific product codes that may represent specific grades of Fluting and Testliner. The main designation DOES match exactly in the Description of Goods field.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Final assessment of goods description text match
comparison_steps.description: Certificate's identity-bearing main designation 'Fluting- Testliner' found exactly in invoice's 'Description of Goods' field
comparison_steps.result: MATCH on text level. The identity-bearing main designation 'Fluting- Testliner' is present in both documents verbatim.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate references Invoice No: 108759. Invoice shows Invoice no: 108759. Order No: 17470 matches Our Order number: 17470.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice number matches exactly. However, certificate does not contain an invoice DATE. Certificate issue date is 2023-03-08, invoice date is 2023-03-03. No explicit invoice date is stated in the certificate's goods description field. The certificate does not contain an explicit 'as per invoice' or 'according to attached invoice' phrase either — it merely states 'Invoice No: 108759'.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'Fluting- Testliner' found exactly in invoice
Short designation for product type - RF1 and T3 are product codes that may correspond to Fluting and Testliner, but require industry knowledge

rules_evaluated_but_not_applied.description: Priority 1 - Article numbers: no article numbers in certificate
rules_evaluated_but_not_applied.reason: Not applicable - certificate does not contain article numbers

rules_evaluated_but_not_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens - certificate lacks explicit invoice date and 'as per invoice' phrase in goods description

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '48 Packages Fluting- Testliner, Invoice No: 108759'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Fluting- Testliner'. The invoice's Description of Goods field states 'Fluting- Testliner' — an exact match. However, the invoice line items use product codes 'RF1' (appears twice, under 85 GSM at 80cm and 100cm sheet sizes) and 'T3' (under 100 GSM at 90cm). These codes likely correspond to specific grades of Fluting (RF1) and Testliner (T3), but this requires industry knowledge per rule 4.3.3.3. The general description matches exactly, but the specific product-level mapping between 'Fluting- Testliner' and 'RF1'/'T3' requires specialist knowledge. Given the exact match on the general goods description 'Fluting- Testliner' in the invoice's Description of Goods field, this would normally be MATCH. However, applying 4.3.3.3: the line items use short codes that require industry knowledge — this triggers MANUAL_REVIEW for the specific product mapping. On reflection, the Description of Goods field in the invoice provides a general product description that exactly matches the certificate. The line items are detailed breakdowns. Per rule 4.3.4, additional detail (like product codes per line) should not cause MISMATCH when the identity-bearing main designation is confirmed. The main designation 'Fluting- Testliner' IS confirmed. But the concern is whether RF1 and T3 truly are Fluting and Testliner — this is the industry knowledge gap. Setting to MANUAL_REVIEW because the specific product codes require industry knowledge to verify against the general description, per 4.3.3.3.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because RF1 and T3 cannot be matched to Fluting and Testliner
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice's general Description of Goods explicitly states 'Fluting- Testliner', which exactly matches the certificate. The line item codes are product-level detail. Per 4.3.4, additional detail does not cause MISMATCH when the main designation is confirmed.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Direct MATCH because the Description of Goods field matches exactly
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: While the general description matches, the line items use product codes (RF1, T3) that require industry knowledge to map to Fluting and Testliner. Per 4.3.3.3, this warrants MANUAL_REVIEW rather than automatic MATCH. The system cannot confirm with certainty that all three line items fall under the 'Fluting- Testliner' category without specialist knowledge.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Quantity 46,74 (with line items in MT: 14,604 + 2,208 + 29,928 = 46.74 MT)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '46740kgs'. This is the verification-basis quantity per 4.4.2.1.
comparison_steps.result: Numeric value: 46740, unit: kgs (kilograms). No GW/NW category explicitly stated.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 46740 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: The value 46740 does not appear directly in the invoice. The invoice shows 'Total Quantity 46,74' without explicit unit. Line items show quantities in MT (metric tons): 14,604 MT + 2,208 MT + 29,928 MT. The Total Quantity 46,74 appears to represent 46.74 MT (where comma is decimal separator in European notation).

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.3 - Exception 3B: Unit conversion MT to KG
comparison_steps.description: Convert invoice's 46.74 MT to KG: 46.74 × 1000 = 46,740 KG
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 46740 kgs. Invoice: 46.74 MT × 1000 = 46,740 KG. Values match exactly. Both the certificate and invoice express the same quantity, just in different units (KG vs MT).

comparison_steps.description: The invoice uses European comma notation: '46,74' represents 46.74 (not 46,740). The line items confirm this: 14.604 + 2.208 + 29.928 = 46.740 MT. Wait — let me recalculate. 14,604 MT + 2,208 MT + 29,928 MT. In European notation with comma as decimal separator: 14.604 + 2.208 + 29.928 = 46.74 MT. This confirms the Total Quantity 46,74 means 46.74 MT.
comparison_steps.result: CONFIRMED: Invoice Total Quantity is 46.74 MT. Converting: 46.74 MT × 1000 = 46,740 KG. Certificate states 46740 kgs. Exact match after unit conversion.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '46740kgs' without explicit GW or NW designation. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: if certificate states a single weight value without weight category, and this value can be identified in the invoice, and the invoice does NOT contain a contradictory alternative weight of another category → MATCH.
comparison_steps.result: The certificate contains exactly one weight value (46740 kgs) without GW/NW category. The invoice contains one total quantity (46.74 MT = 46740 KG) without explicit GW/NW category. No contradictory alternative weight value exists in the invoice. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2 → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Exception 3B - Unit conversion MT to KG: 46.74 MT × 1000 = 46,740 KG = certificate's 46740 kgs
Decimal notation normalization - comma as decimal separator confirmed by line item sum
Single weight value without GW/NW category - no contradictory alternative in invoice → MATCH

rules_evaluated_but_not_applied.description: Exception 3A - Multiple invoices: not applicable, only one invoice
rules_evaluated_but_not_applied.reason: Only one invoice in document pair

normalizations_used: Unit conversion MT to KG (1 MT = 1000 KG)
Decimal notation normalization (comma as decimal separator)
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '46740kgs'. Invoice: 'Total Quantity 46,74' with line items 14,604 MT + 2,208 MT + 29,928 MT. The comma in '46,74' is a decimal separator (European notation), confirmed by the line item sum: 14.604 + 2.208 + 29.928 = 46.740 MT. Wait — 14.604 + 2.208 = 16.812 + 29.928 = 46.740. So the sum is 46.740 MT but the total says 46.74 MT. This is consistent: 46.740 MT truncated to 2 decimal places = 46.74 MT. Converting 46.74 MT to KG: 46.74 × 1000 = 46,740 KG. Certificate: 46740 kgs. EXACT MATCH after 3B conversion. Certificate has single weight value without GW/NW; invoice has single total without GW/NW; no contradictory alternative → MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The comma in '46,74' is a thousands separator, meaning 46,740 MT = 46,740,000 KG
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.5.3.1: the alternative interpretation (comma as thousands separator) gives 46,740 MT = 46,740,000 KG which is unreasonable for a paper shipment of 48 packages. The line items (14.604 + 2.208 + 29.928 = 46.74 MT) confirm comma-as-decimal interpretation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because no explicit GW/NW is stated
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value in certificate without category, identifiable in invoice, no contradictory alternative → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin designation in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains 'Goods origin United Kingdom' — this is an explicit origin field.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice's explicit 'Goods origin' field
MATCH - origin expressly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'United Kingdom'. Invoice 'Goods origin' field: 'United Kingdom'. Exact match. The origin is stated in a dedicated field in the invoice. Clear MATCH.

Consignor country verification via IBAN prefix SE

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No LC reference found in certificate
All three criteria met: invoice reference 108759 matches, consignor identifiable in invoice header, consignee identifiable in Buyer field

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Corporate structure - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Consignor 'Forest Papper AB' found in invoice header as 'FOREST PAP9ER AB' (OCR rendering variant) with matching address

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Single character deviation with confirming identifier
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: One character difference (P vs 9 in PAPPER/PAP9ER), same address confirms identity
VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE confirm Sweden
Buyer field used as primary invoicing field
Exact match: VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: 'Fluting- Testliner' found exactly in invoice Description of Goods
Line item codes RF1 and T3 require industry knowledge to confirm mapping to Fluting and Testliner

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Exception 3B - Unit conversion MT to KG
Decimal notation normalization at MT conversion
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Comma as decimal separator confirmed by line item sum

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Weight category assessment - single value without GW/NW
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Single weight value, no contradictory alternative in invoice → point 2 applies
Explicit 'Goods origin United Kingdom' field in invoice
United Kingdom = United Kingdom, exact match

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet och ursprungsland överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Varubeskrivningen 'Fluting- Testliner' finns ordagrant i fakturan, men fakturans radnivåkoder (RF1 och T3) kräver branschkunskap för att säkerställa att de verkligen avser Fluting respektive Testliner. Manuell granskning rekommenderas för att bekräfta produktkopplningen.
overall_assessment.consolidation_reasoning: Consignor: MATCH (confidence 0.92) — name identified in invoice header with single-character OCR artifact, same address, country confirmed via VAT/IBAN. Consignee: MATCH (confidence 0.98) — exact match in Buyer field. Goods description: MANUAL_REVIEW (confidence 0.72) — general description 'Fluting- Testliner' matches exactly, but line item product codes RF1 and T3 require industry knowledge per 4.3.3.3. Quantity: MATCH (confidence 0.93) — 46740 kgs = 46.74 MT via 3B conversion. Origin: MATCH (confidence 0.99) — United Kingdom matches exactly. One checkpoint at MANUAL_REVIEW → overall result MANUAL_REVIEW.
blocking_issues: Goods description line item codes (RF1, T3) require industry knowledge to verify against 'Fluting- Testliner' description

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Forest Papper AB, Åsgatan 4, 41463, GÖTEBORG, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: FOREST PAP9ER AB, Åsgatan 4, 414 63 GÖTEBORG, VAT no: SE556878121401
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur 4.1.0 – consignor identifierad i fakturans sidhuvud; enstaka teckenavvikelse 4.1.3.8 (PAP9ER vs PAPPER, OCR-artefakt); land verifierat via VAT-prefix SE
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Forest Papper AB' identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud som 'FOREST PAP9ER AB' — en teckenposition skiljer (P vs 9, uppenbar OCR/fontsartefakt). Adressen Åsgatan 4, Göteborg matchar exakt. Land Sverige bekräftas via VAT-nummer med prefix SE och IBAN med prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S., PANCAR ORGANIZE SANAYI BOLGESI MUZAFFER SEKBAN CAD NO:8 TORBALI IZMIR, TURKEY
sections.invoice_value: VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S., Pancar Organize Sanayi Bölgesi Muzaffer Sekban cad. No:8 Torbali IZMIR, TURKEY
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning mot fakturans Buyer-fält (4.2.0.2 prioritet 1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'VIVA KAGIT VE AMBALAJ A.S.' matchar exakt fakturans Buyer-fält. Land Turkiet överensstämmer.

sections.invoice_value: Description of Goods: Fluting- Testliner; Line items: 85 RF1 (14,604 MT), 85 RF1 (2,208 MT), 100 T3 (29,928 MT)
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – huvudbeteckning matchar; kortbeteckning för varutyp (4.3.3.3) – radnivåkoder kräver branschkunskap
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Fluting- Testliner' återfinns ordagrant i fakturans 'Description of Goods'-fält. Fakturans radnivå använder dock produktkoderna RF1 och T3 istället för 'Fluting' och 'Testliner'. Dessa koder kräver branschkunskap för att entydigt kopplas till den generella varubeskrivningen. Manuell granskning krävs för att bekräfta produktkodsmappningen.

sections.invoice_value: Total Quantity 46,74 (MT, confirmed by line items: 14,604 + 2,208 + 29,928 = 46.74 MT)
sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3B – enhetsomräkning MT till KG (4.4.5.3): 46.74 MT × 1000 = 46 740 KG; decimaltecken bekräftat via radposter (4.4.5.3.1); enbart viktvärde utan GW/NW, inget motstridigt alternativ (4.4.2.2 punkt 2)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 46740 kgs. Fakturan anger Total Quantity 46,74 med radposter i MT (14,604 + 2,208 + 29,928 = 46.74 MT). Komma tolkas som decimaltecken (europeisk notation), bekräftat av radsummorna. Omräkning: 46.74 MT × 1000 = 46 740 KG. Exakt matchning efter enhetsomräkning. Certifikatet anger ett enda viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori och fakturan innehåller inget motstridigt alternativvärde.
Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'United Kingdom'. Fakturan anger 'Goods origin United Kingdom'. Exakt matchning i dedikerat ursprungsfält.

human_readable_report.summary: Fyra av fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet, ursprungsland) verifieras som MATCH. Varubeskrivningens generella beteckning 'Fluting- Testliner' matchar exakt, men fakturans radnivåkoder (RF1 och T3) kräver branschkunskap för verifiering. Manuell granskning rekommenderas.

flagged_checkpoints: goods_description (MANUAL_REVIEW, confidence 0.72 — not a MATCH checkpoint so confidence floor does not apply)
confidence_floor_check.notes: The goods_description checkpoint has confidence 0.72 but status MANUAL_REVIEW, not MATCH. The confidence floor (0.85) applies only to MATCH checkpoints. All MATCH checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.92.

output_quality_checks.notes: One checkpoint (goods_description) is MANUAL_REVIEW. No checkpoints are MISMATCH. Per consolidation rules: no MISMATCH but one MANUAL_REVIEW → overall MANUAL_REVIEW. All MATCH checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85.
